questionHtml:
Consider the following standard electrode potentials:

Which species will react with each other spontaneously under standard conditions?


A.  Zn2+ (aq) + Pb (s)

B.  Pb2+ (aq) + Br2 (l)

C.  Zn (s) + Br− (aq)

D.  Pb (s) + Br2 (l)

meta.title: Consider the following standard electrode potentials: Which species will react with each other spontaneously under standard conditions? A. Zn2+ (aq) + Pb (s) B. Pb2+ (aq) + Br2 (l)
